text.title: Predictive Analytics for PM Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Predictive Analytics for PM end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: assemble-training-corpus
step.action: Collect ≥30 completed projects with outcome labels.

step.name: version-feature-spec
step.action: Author feature spec YAML; version it.

step.name: train-and-calibrate
step.action: Train baseline + champion model; check calibration on held-out set.

step.name: wire-explainability
step.action: Add SHAP/LIME layer producing top-3 features per forecast.
step.decision-gate: If attribution unstable, mark as caveat.

step.name: deploy-and-track
step.action: Deploy; schedule quarterly calibration check; track action follow-through.
step.decision-gate: If quarterly calibration drops below 0.7, freeze model + investigate.
